channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: apple /container | Swift | N/A
item.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

item.title: FareedKhan-dev /train-llm-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.

item.title: google /skills | Python | N/A
item.description: Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

item.title: roboflow /supervision | Python | N/A
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: activeloopai /hivemind | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: One brain for all your agents

item.title: luongnv89 /claude-howto | Python | N/A
item.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

item.title: harry0703 /MoneyPrinterTurbo | Python | N/A
item.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

item.title: masterking32 /MasterDnsVPN | Go | N/A
item.description: Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: x1xhlol /system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools | N/A | N/A
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: soxoj /maigret | Python | N/A
item.description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
